title: mirabilis californica subsp. aspera
intro: Mirabilis californica subsp. aspera, also known as California four o'clock or rough four o'clock, is a subspecies of the Mirabilis californica plant, a type of flowering plant in the four o'clock family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Mirabilis californica subsp. aspera include its potential to treat wounds, fever, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic to prevent infection. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
